metadata.title:
THE COUNCIL MUST


NOW TAKE A HAND

pages.raw_text:
Public demand today is that the city council take the
further building of the Monroe street bridge in hand and
either order the awarding of the balance of the bridge by
contract discharge the engineers in supervision of the
work and demand that the mayor place competent in
their stead. III


Unless this is done, the city viii have another monu
mental failure it's hands compared wXa which the
Sprague fill will be toy. tolerance
of chds play by the city engineer office in building
of the Monroe street bridge should be terminated The
bridge of the biggest undertakings of its kind
attempted and the plan heretofore pursued of placing
cub engineers in charge of the work win bankrupt the city
if it is continued


The city engineers office estimates the loss caused by
the collapse at $27500 Former Chief Foreman of Con
struction Farney says that the loss is 100000


Councilmen being appealed to all sides to take
the bridge matter in hand and do something Action should
be taken at the meeting next Tuesday night
